description: Synthex knowledge base -- structured second brain for agents

tokenEfficiency.protocol: Load index first, then summaries, then full entries

entries.title: Application Stack & Data Models
entries.summary: Express 4 + TypeScript 5 backend with Prisma ORM on PostgreSQL. Models: User (auth + OAuth), Campaign (multi-platform), Post (content lifecycle), Project, ApiUsage (token tracking), Session. Node 20.x, JWT + Google OAuth auth, Stripe payments.

entries.title: MCP Server Configuration
entries.summary: MCP config defines server connections for Claude Code tooling. Includes Sequential Thinking server, Playwright browser automation, and custom toolkits. Config at Synthex/mcp.config.json.

entries.title: Claude Code Integration Architecture
entries.summary: Claude Code integration uses .claude/ directory with skills (SKILL.md), agents (AGENT.md), hooks (.ps1), and knowledge base. Canonical pattern from tools/claude-seo/ (13 skills, 6 agents). Outside Vercel rootDirectory so zero deployment impact.

entries.title: Vercel Deployment Configuration
entries.summary: Deployed to Vercel as 'synthex-production'. rootDirectory: Synthex. Single serverless function (api/vercel.js) handles all routes via rewrites. 1024MB memory, 30s timeout, iad1 region. Build: npm ci -> prisma generate -> tsc.

entries.title: Platform Master Configuration
entries.summary: 8 platforms configured: YouTube (video authority), Instagram (visual storytelling), TikTok (entertainment discovery), X/Twitter (real-time conversation), Facebook (community), LinkedIn (professional authority), Pinterest (inspiration), Reddit (community discussion). Each has algorithm weights, content specs, winning formulas, and optimal posting schedules.
